name: Marco Island Key Lime Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cans sweetened condensed milk (14 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. PECAN CRUST: Saute pecans in butter until lightly browned. Place nuts and butter in a food processor, then add the crumbs, lime peel, cinnamon, sugar, and mix until coarse. Press into a 10-inch pie plate; reserve some for garnish if desired.
2. PIE FILLING: Beat egg yolks at high speed for 4-5 minutes. Slowly add condensed milk with the mixer running at medium, then add lime juice the same way. Add peel and mix slowly. Pour mixture into prepared crust. Fill baking pan halfway with water, and place on the lowest rack of the oven. Place pie plate on the rack above the water, and bake at 300°F until firm, 20-25 minutes. Do not allow the pie to brown. Remove from oven and cool to room temperature, then place in refrigerator to set and chill for about 4 hours.
3. To serve, garnish with whipped cream and crust crumbs if desired.
